event: Process filing: VEON Q3 2026 earnings call transcript
description: Single (filer, reporting_period). Agent runs all 5 extractions + earnings-analysis synthesis, stages 1 markdown + 5 JSON envelopes under ./out/.

event: Process filing: Vodafone FY 2026 annual report
description: Non-transcript filing — agent skips earnings-call-themes (transcripts only) and stages 1 markdown + 4 JSON envelopes.

event: Process filing: Ericsson Q4 2026 earnings call transcript (vendor filer)
description: Vendor filer. filer_kind='vendor', filer_operator_id stays null (DB CHECK requires null for vendor filers).

event: Process filing: coverage-list tier-1 EMEA operators, period Q3 2026
description: Fan-out across the ANTA coverage universe. Orchestration layer iterates one session per (operator, reporting_period).

event: Process filing: VEON Q3 2026 earnings call transcript [scoring_cycle_id=<uuid>]
description: When the run is bound to an ANTA scoring cycle, pass scoring_cycle_id through the request context so all envelopes carry it.

event: Re-process filing: VEON Q3 2026 earnings call transcript
description: Idempotent re-run. UPSERTs source_docs by (filer_name, reporting_period, doc_type) and replaces prior child rows. Useful when a transcript correction lands or extraction logic improves.
